objective: Plan the reusable OutcomeRoom package-to-genesis-to-System spine, child admission base, reciprocal membership, receipts, and exported lineage proof.
falsifiable_claim: Every exported room child traces to one admitted package, genesis, System, constitution, and room root; stale, wrong-System, unbound, and direct-client mutations cannot bypass the owner boundary.
dependencies: M1 and M2 selected System truth
exit_criteria: Export verifies package -> genesis -> System -> room -> every child.
Stale, wrong-System, unbound, and direct-client mutations refuse; hosted aggregation cannot bypass constitution or Agentgres.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M4_OUTCOME_ROOM_SYSTEM_SPINE_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute package, genesis, System, constitution, room, child base, membership, predecessor, transition root, and direct-client writes.
remaining_nonclaims: Hosted admission only; no external participant or federation claim.
OutcomeRoom aggregation grants no wallet authority and closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
